name: Cinnamon-Raisin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure carefully and place all ingredients except raisins into the bread machine pan in the order recommended by the manufacturer.
2. Add the raisins at the Raisin/Nut signal or 5 to 10 minutes before the last kneading cycle ends.
3. Select the Sweet or Basic/White cycle.
4. Choose Medium or Light crust color setting.
5. Remove the baked bread from the pan and cool on a wire rack.
